title: ilex fukienensis
intro: Ilex fukienensis, also known as Fukien Tea or Taiwan Tea, is a small evergreen shrub native to China and Taiwan, belonging to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex fukienensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure levels. Ilex fukienensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a tea or added to herbal remedies, such as capsules or tinctures.
